subcodes.first_line: O thou who diffusest the fragrances of God! The call of the Supreme Concourse is raised continually unto thee, addressing thee as one endowed with understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات الله ندای ملا اعلی مخاطب بشما پی در پی بلند است که ای هوشمند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
